title: genista tinctoria subsp. littoralis
intro: Genista tinctoria subsp. littoralis, also known as Sea Broom or Coastal Bird's-foot, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, due to its high content of isoflavones and saponins. The health benefits associated with Genista tinctoria subsp. littoralis include improved digestion, anti-inflammatory effects, and potential antioxidant properties, which may contribute to overall well-being. Genista tinctoria subsp. littoralis can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
